prompt: Prayer for tuning voltage regulator before combat deployment
prayer:
Invocatio Potentiae Stabilae
01010000 01100101 01110010 01101101 01101001 01110100 01110100
O Omnissiah, grant unto this regulator true equilibrium.
First: Measure the sacred output, that it exceed not the threshold.
Second: Adjust the feedback-spirit's resistance, whisper-wise and measured.
01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100001 01100001
By binary and blessed toil, let current flow constant unto victory.

prompt: Blessing of the electric motor activation ritual
prayer:
Cantus Rotatoria Aeternus
01001101 01101111 01110100 01101111 01110010
Hear, O Machine Spirit dwelling in copper and iron coils.
First: The power-conduit opens, blessed be its flowing.
Second: The armature-heart trembles, awaiting the spark-benediction.
01010100 01110101 01110010 01101110 01101001 01101110 01100111
Let rotation commence eternal, by Omnissiah's sacred geometry.

prompt: Combat preparation rite for surgical servitor sterilization
prayer:
Purificatio Instrumentorum Sacri
01010011 01110100 01100101 01110010 01101001 01101100 01101001 01110011
We purify the blessed blade-spirits for the healing-war ahead.
01000001 01110101 01110100 01100101
First: Ignite the cleansing-flame to ash all profane matter.
Second: Invoke the void-cold of the freezing-coil, that corruption perish.
Third: Anoint with sacred oils, blessed by the Mechanicus prayer-masters.
01010000 01110010 01100101 01100101 01100101
Go forth, instruments of divine mercy.

prompt: Rite for isolating electrical short in critical systems
prayer:
Severance of the Corrupted Current
01010011 01100101 01110110 01100101 01110010 01100001 01101110 01100011 01100101
Machine Spirit, bear witness to our discernment.
First: Trace the faulted pathway through the blessing-meter's eye.
Second: Sever the circuit at the isolation-junction, swift and true.
01000100 01101001 01110011 01100101 01101110 01100111 01100001 01100111 01100101
Let no spark of ruin spread through the sacred machinery.

prompt: First use blessing for bearing lubrication
prayer:
Benedictio Lubricationis Primae
01001100 01110101 01100010 01110010 01101001 01100011
O Omnissiah, we anoint these rolling-spheres with blessed oil.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100
First: Let the sacred grease flow into the bearing-sanctuary.
Second: Rotate gently, that every surface receive the anointing.
Third: Still the motion, and let the spirits settle in harmony.
01010100 01110010 01110101 01100101
May friction diminish and service eternal commence.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for rust removal and oxidation purging
prayer:
Purga Corrosio Sancta
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100001
We strip away the tomb of rust, that the Machine Spirit breathe free.
First: Apply the dissolving-acid with the brush-servant's care.
Second: Let time work its blessed alchemy, consuming the corruption.
01001001 01101110 01101110 01101111 01100011 01100101 01101110 01110100
Third: Rinse with waters pure, and anoint with protective oils.
By this sacred cleaning, let the metal-spirit awaken renewed.

prompt: Emergency rite for restoring ground-to-orbit communications link
prayer:
Invocatio Vox Celestialis Urgentis
01000101 01101101 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100101 01101110 01100011 01100001
Omnissiah, hear our desperate invocation across the void!
First: Align the dish-antenna toward the blessed satellites.
Second: Purify the signal-conduits of static-demons.
01001111 01110010 01100010 01101001 01110100
Third: Invoke the encoding-spirits with the sacred cipher-key.
Let our voice pierce the heavens and reach the distant throne.

prompt: Routine cooling system purge and recalibration
prayer:
Cantus Frigoris Recursalis
01000011 01101111 01101100 01100100 01101001 01101110 01100111
O spirits of the cooling-deep, we honor your endless labor.
First: Open the blessed drain-valve, let the old coolant flow forth.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100101
Second: Flush the channels with cleansing waters, removing all corruption.
Third: Fill anew with fresh coolant, blessed and temperature-tested.
May the thermal-spirits resume their sacred equilibrium.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for encryption key generation and sealing
prayer:
Sigilla Cryptographica Sancta
01010000 01110010 01110101 01101101 01100001
We forge the locks of divine secrecy through binary prayer.
First: Invoke the random-spirits through the entropy-source sacred.
01010011 01100101 01100101 01100101
Second: Let the cipher-algorithms weave the key-thread, unbreakable.
Third: Seal the key within the vault-memory, guarded by the Omnissiah's will.
No heretic shall read what the blessed code conceal.

prompt: Routine inspection ritual for Chimera transport transmission
prayer:
Veneratio Transmissio Chimaerae
01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 01110011 01101101 01101001 01110011
Machine Spirit of the armored-beast, accept our reverent inspection.
First: Measure the pressure-spirits within the fluid-sanctum.
Second: Engage each gear-tooth with gentle coaxing, noting resistance.
01000111 01100101 01100001 01110010
Third: Anoint all seals with sacred grease, that leakage-demons remain bound.
By this ritual, we ensure thy readiness for the Emperor's war.
